i don't understand why it should not be avaliable at a
push of a button.... what am i missing

--- "Spector, Edward (Private Banking and Investment -
WFCB)" edward_spector@ml.com wrote:

Ok. If you are ok, I would like to send it to you
next Wednesday as of
next Tuesday's close. I am in Birmingham on business
Monday and doing
Community Service for Merrill in the Bronx on
Tuesday. Thanks

WFCB)" edward_spector@ml.com wrote:

Jeffrey,

FTC, LHW, and AW have done well this year with
Merrill. I plan on
sending you an email with the 2005 profit info for
each account the
first week of January . If you want to see it
earlier, then please
advise and I can prepare it with the latest
available information at the
time. Thanks.

Ed
